calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-28-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Statutory Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Feb-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. TYLER F. CLARK of Clark Employment Law, APC, Tel No. (818) 741-2101 appearing for the Plaintiff Gregg Nottingham;
Atty. SACHA M. STEENHOEK of Morgan, Lewis & Bockius, LLP, Tel No. (415) 442-1267.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GREGG NOTTINGHAM'S Motion For Statutory Attorneys Fees is granted and the court awards a total of $34,000 as reasonable fees. The court denies the request for a multiplier. The case was not novel, did not require extraordinary skill, did not produce an exceptional result, and the litigation was in its fledgling state and did not seriously impact other employment. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2014 Continued To Mar-18-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Memorandum Of Costs
Off Calendar Jan-13-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS GAP, INC., AND ATHLETA, INC.'S Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Memorandum Of Costs is taken off calendar pursuant to stipulation. The court has executed the parties' stipulation and order. Judge: A. James Robertson, II, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/AJR)
